title: Pigeon's Poke Pack [1.7.0] - Fang and Claw
description:
Models for Pokémon that may or may not have them.

Newly added: Zangoose and Seviper
body:
# Pigeon's Poke Pack 

This project features what is essentially my journey through modelling and animating in BlockBench - It's a datapack that contains a few Pokémon that I like that currently don't have models with some very basic idle animations and movement animations, and some fully fleshed out Pokémon that I'm downright proud of. 

Contents currently include: 
- Blipbug line
- Petilil lines
- Fomantis line
- Snorunt line
- Absol
- Volcanion
- Zangoose & Seviper


Cobblemon 1.6 Compatible

I hope you can enjoy this journey with me and by extension this datapack too. - Thanks for over 100,000 downloads!
